Roblox.ClientSettings.Api.Models.Respons.description: Contains the names of the libraries in an Android Binary Module.

Contains information about an Android Binary Module for a given channel.
including its module name, the names of its libraries, and whether the channel supports Android binaries.

moduleName.description: The name of the Android Binary Module.

supportsAndroidBinaries.description: True if the channel supports android binaries. False otherwise.

Roblox.ClientSettings.Api.Models.Respons.description: Beta program information included in the user channel response.

id.description: The ID of the beta program.

name.description: The display name of the beta program.

Roblox.ClientSettings.Api.Models.Respons.description: Response for endpoints returning ota information.

appStorageResetId.description: The application storage reset ID for the LuaApp OTA.

assetId.description: The asset ID of the LuaApp OTA.

assetVersion.description: The asset version of the LuaApp OTA.

assetsManifest.description: Inlined assets manifest for the LuaApp OTA.

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the ota asset

isDevelopmentConfig.description: Indicates whether the LuaApp OTA is a development configuration.

isForcedUpdate.description: Indicates whether the LuaApp OTA is a forced update.

isStandalone.description: Refers to whether the plugin is core to Studio functions, and is used to determine when it is loaded.

localAssetURI.description: The local asset URI for the LuaApp OTA.

maxAppVersion.description: The maximum application version compatible with the LuaApp OTA.

tryoutName.description: The name of the tryout for the LuaApp OTA.

Roblox.ClientSettings.Api.Models.Respons.description: Response data object for getting a user's channel information.

channelAssignmentType.description: How the user was bound to the channel. If the user is not assigned to any channel, this is omitted. ['None' = 0, 'PerMille' = 1, 'BoundToPrivateChannel' = 2, 'BoundToPublicChannel' = 3, 'OptedInToBetaProgramWithPrivateChannel' = 4, 'OptedInToBetaProgramWithPublicChannel' = 5]

isFlagOnly.description:
Whether the channel is flag-only. A flag-only channel uses production binaries.
If the channel is not flag-only, this is omitted.

token.description: JWT token. If the channel is not private, this is omitted.

parameters.description: The version string of the application. i.e. 2.660.392
parameters.name: version

parameters.description: The name of the channel. E.g. ZFlag, ZIntegration
parameters.name: channelName

get.summary: Retrieve the Android binary information for a given version and channel name.

parameters.description: Platform(WindowsPlayer, WindowsStudio, MacPlayer or MacStudio) for which we want the latest version
parameters.name: binaryType

get.summary: Get client version information for specific binary type

parameters.description: Platform(WindowsPlayer, WindowsStudio, MacPlayer or MacStudio) for which we want the latest version
parameters.name: binaryType

401.description: 5: Not authorized to perform this action.

get.summary: Get client version information for specific binary type

Returns a listing of all known compression dictionaries, including their SHA256 and creation date.
This will be sorted by creation date, with the most recent dictionaries first.

parameters.description: The SHA256 of the dictionary we wish to download.
parameters.name: dictionarySha256

get.summary: Returns the specified compression dictionary as a file download.

parameters.description: Binary type of the application to get info for
parameters.name: binaryType

parameters.description: Channel name. If not provided, production is assumed.
parameters.name: channel

parameters.description: Tag to filter results by. Only applicable to non-studio application types.
parameters.name: tag

parameters.description: Name to filter results by. Only applicable to non-studio application types.
parameters.name: name

400.description:
2: Invalid binaryType.
4: Invalid app version.
6: Missing or invalid channel.
7: Unsupported binaryType.

401.description: 5: Not authorized to perform this action.

get.summary:
Get OTA information for a specific binary type with a given version on some channel.
Returns empty list if no updates are found or channel/application with the given version does not exist in CVS.
Get channel name for currently logged in user
